rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM RICHARD HAHN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to November 15, 2016. if Mr. Killian wants additional compensation for extraordinary services, he must file a petition for additional compensation no later than 10/31/16 and notice it that same day. No later than Tuesday, November 8, 2016, Mr. Bassin must file a declaration from his client setting forth all open litigation matters (including case numbers), in which the estate is a party. the declaration must provide an update to the court on each matter, including the claim against the estate, the current procedural state, and the estimated resolution time frame.
